locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲（英語：Sub-Saharan Africa）指撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲地區，也稱黑非洲（Negro Africa）。自然地理上與衣索比亞界高度重疊。政治上，包括了所有或部分领土位于撒哈拉沙漠以南的国家（苏丹除外，尽管位于撒哈拉…

relations.subject: Cinnamon-breasted bunting
relations.evidence: Having a very widespread distribution, cinnamon-breasted buntings are found across most of mainland sub-Saharan Africa{{ cite book | last=Dean | first=W.R.J

relations.subject: Cinnamon-breasted bunting
relations.evidence: According to the IUCN, they are categorized as least concern. However, their range has expanded since 1985 due to climate change and habitat fragmentation
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
